Tests that the tangent of infinity is NaN using the Math.tan function.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.tan` function in JavaScript when given `Infinity` as an input. It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.tan(Infinity)` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number). This test ensures that the `Math.tan` function correctly handles edge cases involving infinite values, which is important for maintaining mathematical accuracy in computations. The script is narrow in functionality, focusing solely on this specific mathematical operation.
